'''Rasca Darklighter''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She was the sister of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Gavin Darklighter]] and the daughter of [[Silya Darklighter|Silya]] and [[Jula Darklighter]].

==Biography==
Her husband had been an officer in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] who [[Death/Legends|died]] fighting the [[Yevetha]] in the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. After this tragedy her brother Gavin Darklighter and his wife [[Sera Faleur Darklighter|Sera Darklighter]] insisted that Rasca and her children move in with them. The temporary situation eventually became more permanent. Rasca often felt guilty and believed herself to be a burden on her brother however Gavin insisted that her and her children stay.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' {{1stm}}
